summary: The diff implements extensive frontend features for auctions and trade offers (REQ-3 through REQ-10) with corresponding React Query hooks. However, the backend implementation (REQ-1 and REQ-2) is entirely absent from the diff — no changes to backend/main.mo are present. The frontend hooks call backend actor functions but the actual Motoko backend logic is not shown as modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Extend the backend actor to support an Auction data model and provide functions: createAuction, placeBid, cancelAuction, getAuction, listActiveAuctions, listAuctionsByVendor, finalizeAuction. Enforce creator/admin-only cancel and finalize.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to backend/main.mo appear in the diff. The frontend hooks reference these backend functions but the actual backend implementation is not present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Extend the backend actor to support a Barter/Trade Offer data model and provide functions: createTradeOffer, acceptTradeOffer, rejectTradeOffer, cancelTradeOffer, counterTradeOffer, getTradeOffer, listTradeOffersForUser, listAllTradeOffers. Swap inventory on accept. Restrict listAllTradeOffers to admin/moderator.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to backend/main.mo appear in the diff. The frontend hooks reference these backend functions but the actual backend implementation is not present.

missing_requirements.requirement: New Trade Offer form allows selecting offered products from the user's owned/purchased inventory. Requested items can be searched or entered by product ID.
missing_requirements.reason: The NewTradeOfferForm uses free-text product name/ID input fields rather than selecting from the user's actual owned/purchased inventory or a searchable product list. There is no inventory lookup or product search integration visible.

hallucinated_features.description: urlParams.ts utility file was modified and included in the diff
hallucinated_features.reason: The diff includes changes to frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts, which has no relationship to auction or trade offer features requested in REQ-1 through REQ-10.
